messages.reasoning:
The order 1042 is for All-Season 225/60R16 (SKU TIRE-225-60R16), and it's in transit with an ETA window of January 2, 2026, 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM UTC.

The customer has a contact time preference of "after 2pm Eastern." Eastern time is UTC-4 (EDT) or UTC-5 (EST). January 2 is EST (UTC-5), so 14:00-16:00 UTC = 9:00-11:00 AM Eastern. That doesn't conflict with the after 2pm preference — the ETA is in the morning Eastern time.

My reply should be concise and friendly, suitable for a text message.
